news.t: Golden Eagle Strategies Releases first Hypergrowth Trend Report, Advancing Hypergrowth Stocks as a Distinct Asset Class
Introducing the Golden Eagle Dynamic Hypergrowth ETF (HYP), Providing Targeted Exposure to Companies Achieving 40%+ Annual Revenue Growth

holdings.infoBox: HYP is an equity ETF with a total of 60 individual holdings. The top holdings are Western Digital stock at 3.25%, Kioxia Holdings at 2.96%, Seagate Technology Holdings at 2.89%, Viavi Solutions at 2.78%, and Bloom Energy at 2.63%.

overview.description: The Golden Eagle Dynamic Hypergrowth ETF (HYP) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in total market equity. The fund is actively managed, investing in US-listed companies with extremely rapid sales growth, targeting firms meeting its hypergrowth criteria and using a proprietary model to screen and weight holdings. HYP was launched on Sep 23, 2025 and is issued by Golden Eagle.

data.title: HYP ETF: Capitalizing on "Hypergrowth" Stocks While Managing Risk
data.text: Marc Zuccaro with Golden Eagle Strategies talks about his firm's Dynamic Hypergrowth ETF (HYP). The ETF holds about 60 companies that show 40% or more year-over-year growth.

data.title: Introducing the Golden Eagle Dynamic Hypergrowth ETF (HYP), Providing Targeted Exposure to Companies Achieving 40%+ Annual Revenue Growth
data.text: DELRAY BEACH, Fla.--(BUSINESS WIRE)--Introducing the Golden Eagle Dynamic Hypergrowth ETF (HYP); active ETF's PM team has more than 40 years' experience identifying hypergrowth companies.
